refund_policy.section: Annual subscriptions are eligible for a prorated refund within 30 days of renewal if no support escalation has been resolved. Outside the 30 day window only credit toward future months is offered.
Monthly subscriptions are non refundable after the billing date. Cancellation stops the next charge but does not refund the current month.
Trial conversions older than 14 days, chargeback disputes already filed with the payment processor, accounts in violation of acceptable use policy.
